expectations.text: model_and_parts_created: Script creates a model with at least two parts: a cam (fixed to ground) and a follower
expectations.evidence: model create model_name = model; part .model.cam and part .model.follower both created with rigid_body name_and_position

expectations.text: translational_joint: A translational joint constrains the follower to translate along X
expectations.evidence: constraint create joint translational .model.follower_trans with markers oriented (90D, 90D, 0D) to align local z-axis with global +X

expectations.text: uses_step5_not_step: STEP5 is used for the cam force (not plain STEP)
correct_dx_range_0_to_20: STEP5 x-range spans 0 to 20 (follower displacement 0 to 20 mm)
correct_force_range_0_to_500: STEP5 output range spans 0 to 500 (force 0 to 500 N)
hold_beyond_20mm: Force holds at 500 N for DX > 20 mm (STEP5 naturally saturates at h1)
expectations.evidence: STEP5 is used; it natively saturates at h1=500.0 for x >= x2=20.0

expectations.text: velocity_damping_2_vx: Damping term 2.0 * VX(...) added to force expression
quoted_expression: Full FUNCTION= expression wrapped in double quotes
expectations.evidence: function = "STEP5(...) + 2.0 * VX(...)" — entire expression in double quotes

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape added to each part (cam and follower)
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape cylinder .model.cam.cam_cyl and geometry create shape cylinder .model.follower.follower_cyl

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All markers, parts, joints, and forces use .model.xxx or .model.xxx.yyy dot-path format throughout
No occurrence of 'adams_id' found in the script

expectations.text: simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: simulation single_run transient end_time=1.0 number_of_steps=1000 model_name=.model

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No lines matching '^ERROR:' found in aview.log; run_adams_cmd.py exited with code 0
